title: Monthly Retention Rate
sql_text: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as month, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as users FROM users WHERE created_at >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

title: Cohort Analysis
sql_text: SELECT cohort_month, period_number, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as users FROM user_cohorts GROUP BY cohort_month, period_number

title: Marketing Funnel
sql_text: SELECT stage, COUNT(*) as users FROM marketing_funnel GROUP BY stage ORDER BY stage

title: Campaign ROI
sql_text: SELECT campaign_name, (revenue - cost) / cost * 100 as roi FROM campaigns WHERE cost > 0
